title: Milestone 0: Lock the contracts V1 ontology and rollout boundaries
summary: Milestone 0 is now codified in the implementation: contracts landed as a concept-like sibling surface with a narrow V1 model centered on contract packets, append-only contract events, repo event publication, basic query-side resolution, and explicit deferral of MCP mutation/resource exposure and richer contract-aware impact integration to later milestones.

acceptance.label: The contracts-01 rollout has an explicit V1 scope that includes schema or storage, read surfaces, mutations, and limited query integration but excludes derived policy enforcement
The minimum contract object and event model are narrow enough to ship without a large second taxonomy pass
Open questions that would block implementation are reduced to a small explicit list or folded into concrete V1 choices
